nasb.text: The land of Egypt will become a desolation and waste. Then they will know that I am the Lord. Because you said, ‘The Nile is mine, and I have made it,’

esv.text: and the land of Egypt shall be a desolation and a waste. Then they will know that I am the Lord. “Because you said, ‘The Nile is mine, and I made it,’

cnv.text: 埃及地必荒涼廢棄，人就知道我是耶和華。 “‘因為法老曾說：“這河是我的，是我自己做的。”

ccb.text: 使埃及一片荒凉。这样，他们就知道我是耶和华。因为你说这尼罗河属于你，是你造的。
